data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.gText_NurseJoy_Welcome: Hello, and welcome to the POKéMON\nCENTER.\pWe restore your tired POKéMON to\nfull health.\pWould you like to rest your POKéMON?
data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.gText_NurseJoy_WeHopeToSeeYouAgain: We hope to see you again!
data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.gText_NurseJoy_ThankYouForWaiting: Thank you for waiting.\pWe've restored your POKéMON to\nfull health.
data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.UnknownString_81A0B57: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\nTRADE CENTER.
data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.UnknownString_81A0B87: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\nCOLOSSEUM.
